task_objective: Optimize UI responsiveness and implement warmed-boot state management
design_decisions: Implemented `_cached_config_path` in `PyludusaviAdapter` to avoid redundant subprocess calls during refresh checks.
Moved all blocking RPCs in `main.py` to use `_call` for background execution on a dedicated thread.
Refactored error handling in `service.py` and `ludusavi.py` to allow exceptions to propagate as `RpcStatus` to the frontend.
Introduced module-level global variables in `src/index.tsx` to persist plugin state across Decky remounts.
Implemented 'Warmed Boot' logic in `loadInitial` to render the UI instantly using cached data while performing a background refresh.
Added optimistic updates for settings changes (auto-sync, game selection) with automatic rollback on failure.
Updated `ludusaviLauncher.ts` to handle `RpcResult` structures from backend calls.
results: UI responsiveness significantly improved by eliminating synchronous backend blocking and implementing instant rendering via global state caching. All tests pass, and the project maintains high coverage (90%).
